title: Some people just become part of your physics
description:
Moth to flame. Waves to shore. Cold to winter. Rainbow after rain.
Some things don't choose. They just pull. #Shorts #poetry #lovepoem #breathofpoetry
hook_visual: Slow-motion moth approaching a candle flame — warm amber on black — with white serif text appearing word by word: 'Some people just become part of your physics.' Silent for first 2 seconds, then audio fades in.
end_screen_cta: Hold on the final line — 'like a rainbow after the rain' — cut to black, then text: 'Which line stayed with you? Full poem in bio.'
